list.page_subtitle: Requests for additional services outside the standard cleaning contract. Pricing is proposed by the provider and approved by the customer before any work begins.
list.empty_state: No Extra Work requests yet. Create one to get started.
list.empty_filtered_desc: Try clearing one of the filters above.
list.empty_billing_month: No Extra Work bills in this month.
list.invoice_run_confirm_mark: Mark all completed Extra Work for {{month}} as invoiced?
list.invoice_run_confirm_clear: Clear the invoiced status for all Extra Work in {{month}}?
list.invoice_run_multi_company: This month spans multiple companies — narrow the view to one to run invoicing.
quote.page_subtitle: Compose the work you would like priced. The provider prepares a proposal for your approval — nothing is carried out until you approve it.
quote.unavailable_notice: These items already have agreed prices, so no quote is needed — submit them as a regular Extra Work request instead.
quote.unavailable_link: Go to the Extra Work request form
quote.error_not_ready: A quote request is not available for this cart. Adjust the items or use the regular Extra Work request form.
create.quote_only_notice: These items have no agreed price, so they can only be submitted as a quote request.
create.page_subtitle: Build a cart of services you would like the provider to carry out. Lines with a pre-agreed price are scheduled immediately; lines without one go to a manager for a pricing proposal you can approve.
create.field_title_placeholder: Short summary, e.g. 'Strip and seal lobby floor'
create.field_description_helper: Please describe the extra work in as much detail as possible: exact area, room, surface, preferred date/time, urgency, access instructions, photos, and anything that affects pricing.
create.cart_section_helper: Add one or more services. Each line has its own requested date and optional note.
create.line_field_customer_note_placehol: Anything the provider should know about this line
create.prices.helper: Click a service to add it to your request. Services without an agreed price are priced by the provider after you submit.
create.prices.empty: No agreed contract prices for this customer yet. All services are priced by the provider.
create.error_building_customer_required: Building and customer must both be selected.
create.error_category_other_required: Please describe the unlisted category in the Other field.
create.error_no_access: No accessible building or customer. Ask your administrator to give you access.
create.warning_catalog_empty: No services are configured yet. An admin needs to set up the service catalog before Extra Work can be created.
create.warning_catalog_unavailable: The service catalog could not be loaded. Please refresh in a moment or contact support.
create.error_empty_cart: Add at least one service to the cart before submitting.
create.error_duplicate_service: Each service can only appear once in the cart. Remove the duplicate.
create.error_inactive_service: This service is no longer available.
create.error_line_service_required: Pick a service for every cart line.
create.error_line_custom_required: Describe the custom service or pick one from the list.
create.error_line_requested_date_require: Requested date is required for every line.
create.preview.helper: A live overview of your cart. Lines with a pre-agreed price show your own contract price; other lines are priced by the provider.
create.preview.unavailable: The pricing preview is unavailable right now. You can still submit.
create.preview.to_be_priced: To be priced by the provider
create.preview.totals_display_only: For display only — sum of the lines with an agreed price. Lines the provider still needs to price are not included.
create.preview.totals_unpriced_one: 1 line will be priced by the provider.
create.preview.totals_unpriced_other: {{count}} lines will be priced by the provider.
create.intent.section_title: How would you like to proceed?
create.intent.section_helper: Choose how this request is handled. The available options depend on the pricing above and your permissions.
create.intent.direct.label: Direct order — start now
create.intent.direct.desc: Every line has an agreed price. The request is processed immediately as an order; no separate proposal is needed.
create.intent.auto_start.label: Start after the provider prices it
create.intent.auto_start.desc: The provider prices the non-agreed lines first, then starts the work automatically without waiting for a separate approval.
create.intent.request_quote.label: Request a quote first
create.intent.request_quote.desc: The provider sends a pricing proposal first. Work only starts after you approve the proposal.
create.intent.error.requires_all_agreed: This option is only available when every line has an agreed price.
create.intent.error.requires_non_agreed_: This option requires at least one line the provider still needs to price.
create.intent.error.forbidden_for_role: Your role can't use this option.
create.intent.error.forbidden_for_provid: A provider can't request a quote from itself.
create.intent.error.rejected_generic: The selected option is no longer valid for this cart. Review the pricing preview and choose an allowed option.
create.intent.error.none_selected: Choose how to proceed before submitting the request.
result.heading: Request submitted
result.instant_processing: Your order is being processed — operational tickets will be created shortly.
result.proposal_pending: Your request has been sent for pricing review — you'll be notified when a proposal is ready.
result.routing_breakdown: {{contract}} of {{total}} line(s) match an active contract price; {{needsProposal}} need provider pricing.
detail.proposal_builder_helper: Contract-priced lines are pre-filled. Set a price for the custom lines, remove any you don't need, then send the proposal to the customer.
detail.proposal_builder_empty: No proposal lines yet. Add a line below.
detail.proposal_send_hint: The customer reviews the whole proposal and approves or rejects it. (For an auto-start request the work begins on send, with no separate approval.)
detail.proposal_override_desc: You are recording this decision on behalf of the customer. A reason is required and is saved to the audit trail.
detail.proposal_override_reason_placehol: Why are you deciding on the customer's behalf?
detail.proposal_prepare_helper: Build a priced proposal for this request. The cart lines are copied in automatically, with contract prices pre-filled; you price the custom lines and send.
detail.custom_unit_modal_desc: Name the unit for this line (e.g. m³, pallet). The name appears as the unit on the line and in the PDF.
detail.workflow_customer_decision_helper: The provider has proposed pricing. Please review the lines above and approve or reject.
detail.workflow_no_transitions: No further transitions are available to you in this status.
detail.auto_start_hint: The customer pre-authorized this. Starting skips customer approval and creates the tickets right away.
detail.actual_hours_helper: Enter the hours actually worked on each hourly line to finalize the billable amount. Editable until the operational ticket is approved or closed.
detail.actual_hours_none_entered: Enter at least one value before saving.
detail.actual_hours_error_locked: The final amount is locked: the ticket has been approved or closed. Reopen it to edit actual hours.
detail.actual_hours_error_invalid: Enter a valid number greater than zero for each line.
detail.actual_hours_error_not_hourly: Actual hours can only be entered for hourly lines.
detail.actual_hours_error_forbidden: You do not have permission to enter actual hours for this request.
detail.step_hint_requested: New request. Start the review, then prepare a pricing proposal.
detail.step_hint_under_review: Prepare the pricing proposal below, then send it to the customer for approval.
detail.step_hint_under_review_auto_start: Prepare the pricing proposal below. The customer pre-authorized this — sending the proposal starts the work immediately, no separate approval needed.
detail.override_warning_body: Use only when the customer has agreed by phone, email, or another out-of-band channel. Every override is recorded in the status history with your name, the chosen outcome, and the reason you type below.
detail.override_inline_helper: This overrides the customer's decision and is recorded in the status history.
detail.override_reason_placeholder: e.g. Customer confirmed by phone on 2026-05-15 at 14:00. Their email follow-up is in the ticket thread.
detail.customer_decision_approve_success: Pricing approved. The provider will schedule the work shortly.
detail.retry_spawn_helper: No tickets have been scheduled for this approved request yet. Retry to spawn them now.
detail.retry_spawn_error_wrong_status: Cannot schedule work: request is not in the approved state.
detail.retry_spawn_error_already_done: Tickets are already scheduled for this request.
detail.retry_spawn_error_forbidden: You don't have permission to schedule work for this request.
detail.retry_spawn_error_generic: Could not schedule work. Check the request details and contact support.
detail.reject_dialog_description: Please tell the provider why you're rejecting this proposal. Your reason will appear on the request timeline.
detail.reject_dialog_placeholder: Too expensive, scheduling conflict, no longer needed…
detail.spawned_tickets_desc: Operational work generated from this Extra Work approval.
detail.spawned_tickets_empty: No tickets have been spawned from this Extra Work yet.
detail.cancel_dialog_body: This will move the request to Cancelled and write the status change to the audit log.
detail.cancel_dialog_spawned_warning_tit: 1 active ticket will remain after cancellation
{{count}} active tickets will remain after cancellation
detail.cancel_dialog_spawned_warning_des: Cancelling this Extra Work does not cancel its spawned tickets — those continue to be operational work. Close or approve them separately.
detail.direct_publish_dialog_warning_tit: This bypasses the customer approval step
detail.direct_publish_dialog_warning_des: The proposal will be marked CUSTOMER_APPROVED on the customer's behalf and operational tickets will be opened immediately. The customer will not be asked to approve or reject.
detail.direct_publish_reason_placeholder: e.g. Customer confirmed by phone on 2026-05-28 at 11:00; recording filed under ticket #4521. Direct-publish chosen to start work the same day.
messages.title: Messages
messages.composer_internal_placeholder: Internal note — visible to provider management only, not to the customer.
messages.composer_customer_internal_plac: Internal note — visible to your own customer-side team only, not to the provider.
messages.composer_public_who_sees: Visible to the customer and provider management.
messages.composer_internal_who_sees: Visible only to provider admins and building managers. Not visible to the customer.
messages.composer_customer_internal_who_: Visible to your own customer-side team only. Not visible to the provider.
messages.private_label: Private (only the selected people can see this)
messages.private_disabled_hint: Select at least one person to make this message private.
messages.private_on_hint: Only you and the people you select can see this message.
messages.private_off_hint: Everyone who can see this Extra Work will see this message; the selected people also get a notification.
